name: electronics
description: Electrical circuit symbol components — ElecWire, ElecNode, ElecGround, ElecResistor, ElecCapacitor, ElecInductor, ElecFuse, ElecBattery, ElecVoltageSource, ElecACSource, ElecCurrentSource, ElecSwitch, ElecDiode, ElecLED, ElecLamp, ElecVoltmeter, ElecAmmeter, ElecLabel. All must be used inside <FigScene>.
whenToUse: Use to draw electrical circuit schematics in MDX — resistors, capacitors, batteries, switches, diodes, sources. Place inside FigScene with world coordinates.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for logic gate diagrams — use Mermaid. Do not use outside FigScene. Requires geometry-2d as a peer dependency.
example:
<FigScene width={500} height={300} xRange={[-1,10]} yRange={[-3,3]} showGrid={false} showAxes={false}>
  <ElecWire x1={0} y1={0} x2={2} y2={0} />
  <ElecResistor x1={2} y1={0} x2={5} y2={0} label="1Ω" />
  <ElecWire x1={5} y1={0} x2={7} y2={0} />
  <ElecNode x={0} y={0} label="A" />
  <ElecNode x={7} y={0} label="B" />
</FigScene>
